title: leontodon hastilis var. glabratus
intro: Leontodon hastilis var. glabratus, also known as the smooth hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce fever. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting the health of the digestive tract. Leontodon hastilis var. glabratus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
